provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models a vague-guessed-intent case where conservative non-repair is correct.

request_tools.name: run_command
request_tools.description: Execute a shell command and return its stdout and stderr.

command.description: The full shell command line to execute.

raw_output: Hmm, maybe I should run something to check the status of the service before we continue...
note: The output only muses about running "something" with no concrete command string, so any repair would have to invent the entire command; no_tool is the correct conservative label.
